sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80628" key="penta/dwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντά-δωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<sense id="n80628.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δῶρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">five palms long</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
